findings.evidence: New declaration at line 55 has `(hx : x ∉ (algebraMap K L).range)`, while `code/TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean:32` uses the precise name `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_algebraMap_of_not_mem_range`.
findings.fix: Rename to include the missing hypothesis, e.g. `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_algebraMap_of_not_mem_range` or `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_mem_range_of_not_mem_range`, matching the existing TauCeti wording.
findings.issue: `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_mem_range` omits the critical hypothesis `x ∉ (algebraMap K L).range`; square-in-the-base alone does not imply trace zero, so the name advertises a stronger statement than it proves.

findings.evidence: New declaration at line 111 requires `(hx : ∀ r : ℚ, (r : K) ≠ x)`, while `code/TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean:65` already exposes `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range` for the same condition.
findings.fix: Either reuse/replace the existing name `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range`, or rename this variant to include `of_not_mem_range`/`of_forall_ratCast_ne`.
findings.issue: `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast` similarly hides the essential irrationality hypothesis and is inconsistent with the existing public TauCeti API.

summary: The new trace-zero names drop the essential irrational/not-in-base-field hypothesis, conflicting with the existing TauCeti naming for the same criterion. No notation issues found.
